scrape.title: Scrape
scrape.subtitle: Automatically scrape or manually import influencer emails

table.deleteConfirm: Delete scrape task #{{id}}? This cannot be undone.

modal.title: New Scrape Task
modal.targetMarketHint: All overseas regions. Selecting a specific market significantly sharpens query precision and hit rate.

facebookInfo.title: About Facebook scraping
facebookInfo.warning: Facebook creator ecosystem is thin and Meta blocks scraping aggressively. Hit rate is structurally lower than IG/TikTok — best used as a supplement, not the main channel. target=10 typically yields 3-10. Wall time 5-10 min (cascade visits each Page's external website serially) — please be patient.

modal.targetWarning: Targets above 20 push single-task cost toward the $1 cap and extend wall time. Recommend splitting into multiple smaller tasks (e.g. 2-3 batches); cross-task dedup is automatic.

validation.selectPlatform: Pick a platform that supports automatic scraping

stats.openedHint:
Opened = times the tracking pixel was loaded. QQ, Outlook, 163, etc. block remote images by default — recipients must click "Show images" for tracking to fire. Real open rate is usually higher.

Note: when a recipient replies, the system back-fills opened-at automatically.

batch.rateHint: Emails are sent with 30-60s intervals using your active mailboxes.
batch.sendingHint: Sending with 30-60s intervals to avoid rate limits. This may take a while.

actions.pauseFollowUpHint: Stop auto follow-ups for this influencer; in-flight sends are not recalled
actions.resumeFollowUpHint: Continue from the current follow_up_count (does not reset the counter)
actions.restartHint: Reset to a fresh lead + follow_up_count=0; you'll need to pick this influencer again in Send to trigger the next initial
actions.confirmRestart:
Confirm restart?

The influencer's status will revert to 'new' and follow_up_count will be reset to 0. To trigger a new cadence cycle, you'll need to pick this influencer again in the Send page and dispatch an initial email.

Historical email records are not affected.

gmailGuide.summary: Gmail users: how to get an App Password
gmailGuide.warning: Gmail SMTP requires a 16-character App Password — your login password won't work.
gmailGuide.step3: Re-enter your Gmail login password to confirm identity
gmailGuide.step4: Pick any app name (e.g. Influencer Trigger), click "Create"
gmailGuide.step5: Copy the 16-character password and paste it into the field below

followUp.title: Automated Follow-up
followUp.subtitle:
Two-phase automatic follow-up for non-responsive influencers:
3 intensive follow-ups on days 3 / 5 / 7 after initial send, then 1 monthly follow-up × 6 (~7 months end-to-end, 10 emails total including initial).
Each email uses a different angle generated by GPT-4o; the influencer is auto-archived after the last one.

strategy.title: Follow-up Strategy
strategy.sendTimeHint: Daily check runs at this UTC hour

log.title: Follow-up Log
log.noLogsHint: Follow-ups run automatically each day at the configured UTC hour.

holidays.subtitle: Automatically send greetings on international holidays

deleteModal.title: Delete Holiday
deleteModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete this holiday? This cannot be undone.

modal.templatePlaceholder: Optional. Use {name} and {holiday} as placeholders. Leave empty to use AI-generated greeting.

table.deleteConfirm:
This cannot be undone. The user account is permanently removed and cannot be restored.

Content created by this user (drafts, campaigns, templates etc.) is retained, but the author becomes None.

If you only need a temporary suspension, use 'Disable' instead (reversible).

settings.title: System Settings

followUp.title: Follow-up Strategy
followUp.phase2OnlyHint: ⓘ This page only controls phase-2 (cold) interval/count. Full cadence (incl. phase-1 intensive follow-ups) is configured on the Follow-up page.
followUp.enableHint: When enabled, periodically check and send follow-up emails
followUp.maxHint: Cold-phase follow-up count; total = phase 1 + phase 2

scrape.title: Scrape Configuration
scrape.concurrencyHint: Number of concurrent Playwright browser instances

apify.title: Apify Actor Configuration
apify.subtitle: TikTok / Instagram / Twitter / Facebook scraping runs on Apify. Each platform has its own Token + Actor, isolated from each other. Leave blank to fall back to server/.env env vars.
apify.actorHint: Format: username~actor-name (note: tilde ~, not slash /; we auto-convert if you paste a slash); leave blank to use default {{fallback}}
apify.warning: Token is a sensitive credential and is never shown in plaintext after save. Use a separate token per platform to isolate quota and billing.

youtubeCookies.title: YouTube Cookies
youtubeCookies.subtitle: Paste your authenticated YouTube cookie to unlock the 'View email address' button on creator About pages — meaningfully higher hit rate.
youtubeCookies.warning: Use a SECONDARY YouTube account. Main accounts have higher risk control exposure.
youtubeCookies.statusIncomplete: Auth-critical cookies (SAPISID / __Secure-3PSID etc.) missing — please re-copy the full cookie
youtubeCookies.instructionsToggle: How to get the cookie (F12 steps)
youtubeCookies.instructionsStep1: 1. Sign into youtube.com on Chrome/Edge with a SECONDARY account
youtubeCookies.instructionsStep2: 2. Press F12 to open DevTools, switch to the Network tab
youtubeCookies.instructionsStep3: 3. Refresh the page so Network shows requests
youtubeCookies.instructionsStep4: 4. Click the www.youtube.com (type=document) request in the list
youtubeCookies.instructionsStep5: 5. On the right pane, switch to Headers and scroll to Request Headers
youtubeCookies.instructionsStep6: 6. Find the 'cookie:' row, right-click → Copy value (or select & copy the whole value)
youtubeCookies.instructionsStep7: 7. Paste into the textarea below, click Save
youtubeCookies.instructionsTip: Should look like: VISITOR_INFO1_LIVE=...; YSC=...; SAPISID=...; __Secure-3PSID=... (must contain at least one SAPISID or *PSID)
youtubeCookies.placeholder:
Paste cookie string (recommended): VISITOR_INFO1_LIVE=xxx; YSC=yyy; SAPISID=aaa; __Secure-3PSID=bbb; ...

Or paste JSON array (Cookie Editor extension export format)
youtubeCookies.deleteConfirm: Clear saved cookies? YouTube scraping will fall back to anonymous mode and hit rate will drop significantly.
youtubeCookies.revealFailed: Failed to load cookies file, please retry
